source: string - ONE OF: reference_manual, rule_engine, llm_end_to_end

worksheet.node_id: string - matches node_id in the node JSON
worksheet.stream_ref: string or null - stream_name if this deviation is stream-specific, else null for equipment-level (e.g. level)
worksheet.guide_word: string - e.g. NO, MORE, LESS, REVERSE
worksheet.parameter: string - e.g. flow, temperature, pressure, level, composition
worksheet.deviation_description: string - plain-language statement of the deviation
causes: string - one cause per array entry
consequences: string - one consequence per array entry
worksheet.propagated_from: string or null - entry_id of an upstream node this consequence was propagated from, if applicable

existing_safeguards.instrumentation_ref: string or null - tag of the instrument in the node JSON that provides this safeguard

safeguard_gaps: string - required safeguard type not found in existing_safeguards
recommendations: string - one recommendation per gap, or empty if fully safeguarded
worksheet.severity: string - ONE OF: low, medium, high, severe (optional, for scoring/comparison)
worksheet.rule_source: string or null - which named rule/rule-file entry generated this row, for rule_engine source only; null for reference_manual
